caption:
The perfect pick-me-up treat from @mozartconcierge — a gorgeous bouquet of flowers and my favorite hot drink in hand as I wandered through London, soaking in all the magical Christmas decorations. Wishing everyone a cozy, happy Sunday ✨❤️”
